name: Crunchy 7 Grain - Sesame Bars
recipeInstructions:
1. Cut each slice of bread into 8 sticks.
2. Arrange the bread sticks on ungreased baking sheets.
3. Brush each bread stick lightly with margarine.
4. Sprinkle evenly with Parmesan cheese and sesame seeds.
5. Bake at 350°F for 10-15 minutes or until golden brown.
6. Serve immediately.
